filename: 21.02.25 Preparing for experiment 4 tcycif and geomx.md
relative_path: 4. Meetings & Updates/Meeting_notes/2025/21.02.25 Preparing for experiment 4 tcycif and geomx.md
full_text:
1. tCycif samples

- Check S015 tumor purity, discuss with Anastasia if it has been
 > included in Ashwinis paper

- Check the tumor purity for S195 and ask to add them to the ican
 > batch

2. Panels

- IgD can be switched with CD31

- Anniina will chat with Saun for tissue detachment

- HLA1 and HLA-DPB1 swap for IgD1

 - 555 channels in 5,6,7 to 4,5,6 and the HLA-DPB1

- Zhihan will take snapshots and draft a panel

- 

3. GeoMx

- Stromal capture is not within TBcell zone - but as close as possible
 > and try to avoid tumor

-
